channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Monday, June 8, 2026
item.description: Two dominant threads converge this Monday, Midya, and both touch your core work directly. The Israel-Iran escalation is rattling equity markets and sending oil higher — macro instability that will make every Canadian CFO and university procurement committee more cautious, so fact...
